heading: Limitation on availability of funds for Cooperative Threat Reduction activities in People’s Republic of China
label: 3735 Limitation on availability of funds for Cooperative Threat Reduction activities in People’s Republic of China
notes: Amendments2017—Subsec. (a). struck out “or expended” after “obligated”.Pub. L. 115–91
amendments: Amendments2017—Subsec. (a). struck out “or expended” after “obligated”.Pub. L. 115–91

children.heading: Semiannual installments
children.label: a Semiannual installments
children.text: In carrying out activities under the Program in the People’s Republic of China, the Secretary of Defense shall ensure that Cooperative Threat Reduction funds for such activities are obligated in semiannual installments.

children.label: i
children.text: disrupt the proliferation activities of Li Fangwei (also known as Karl Lee, or any other alias known by the United States); and

children.label: ii
children.text: arrest Li Fangwei pursuant the indictment charged in the United States District Court for the Southern District of New York on ;April 29, 2014

children.label: B
children.text: whether China has proliferated to any non-nuclear weapons state, or any nuclear weapons state in violation of the Treaty on the Non-Proliferation of Nuclear Weapons, any item that contributes to a ballistic missile or nuclear weapons delivery system; and

children.label: C
children.text: the number, type, and summary of any demarches between the United States and China with respect to the matters described in subparagraphs (A) and (B).

children.heading: Additional submissions
children.label: 2 Additional submissions
children.text: At the same time as the Secretary of Defense submits to the congressional defense committees the information described in subparagraphs (A), (B), and (C) of paragraph (1) as part of the reports required by , the Secretary shall submit to the Committee on Foreign Affairs of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Foreign Relations of the Senate such information.section 3711(g) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the first report described in such paragraph that is submitted after , shall cover the preceding 12-month period before the date of such submission; andDecember 23, 2016

children.label: B
children.text: each subsequent report shall cover the semiannual period preceding the date of such submission.

children.heading: Form
children.label: 4 Form
children.text: The information described in subparagraphs (A), (B), and (C) of paragraph (1) shall be submitted in unclassified form, but may include a classified annex.
